intended_use: Hyperfine Swoop® Portable MR Imaging System™ is a bedside magnetic resonance imaging device for producing images that display the internal structure of the head where full diagnostic examination is no
intended_use_full: Hyperfine Swoop® Portable MR Imaging System™ is a bedside magnetic resonance imaging device for producing images that display the internal structure of the head where full diagnostic examination is not clinically practical. When interpreted by a trained physician, these images provide information that can be useful in determining a diagnosis.
target_condition: Conditions requiring brain imaging where full diagnostic examination is not clinically practical
ground_truth: NEMA and ACR imaging quality standards and phantom testing
other_metrics: Imaging performance testing to verify image quality criteria met per NEMA MS 1-2008 (R2020), NEMA MS 3-2008 (R2020), NEMA MS 9-2008 (R2020), NEMA MS 12-2016, and ACR Phantom Test Guidance
